name: Jonathan Taylor
headline: Workhorse anchor coming off a 316-point RB3 finish
body:
Taylor's 2025 was a bell-cow masterclass: 316.3 fantasy points (RB3) on an 82.6% snap share, 323 carries for 1,585 yards at 4.91 a pop, and 18 rushing scores. His efficiency was driven, not lucky -- 2.35 yards after contact per attempt, 27 broken tackles, and an 11.2% explosive-run rate that produced nine runs of 20-plus and three over 50. The +0.074 EPA per play marked a hard rebound from his -0.098 mark in 2024, when a 14-game season still cleared 1,400 yards.

The receiving leap is the new wrinkle: 55 targets and 46 catches on a 10.4% target share, up from 18 grabs the year prior, which broadens his floor in PPR. The lone caveat is quarterback play -- his ceiling tracks closely with Daniel Jones' availability as Jones returns from an Achilles injury. With a top-six ADP and 74 red-zone touches plus 23 goal-line carries fueling the volume, Taylor is a locked-in early first-rounder.
